media-errors.not-found: We couldn't find a camera on your device. Please use another device.
media-errors.already-in-use: Another application is using your camera, please close the other application and try again.
media-errors.constraint: We couldn't find a camera that could be used to take photos. Please use another device.
media-errors.other-error: There was an error accessing your camera. Please try again.

missing-permissions.title: Allow access to your camera
missing-permissions.subtitle: We will need you to take photos of your document to properly verify your identity.
missing-permissions.cta: Open settings to give camera permissions

id-doc-photo-prompt.title: Scan or upload the {{side}} of your {{type}} ({{country}})

position-document.title: Align your {{document}} with the frame outline

background.title: Find a background with good contrast
background.description: The most different from the id card color as possible.

description.doc_type_mismatch: Document type didn't match. Please upload your {{documentType}} from {{countryName}}.
description.unknown_document_type: We couldn't classify this document. Please upload your {{documentType}} from {{countryName}}.
description.unsupported_document_type: Unfortunately the uploaded document type is not supported. Please upload your {{documentType}} from {{countryName}}.
description.wrong_document_side: It looks like you uploaded the wrong side of your document. Please flip your ID and upload the {{side}} of your {{documentType}} from {{countryName}}.
description.wrong_one_sided_document: Incorrect document type detected. Please upload your {{documentType}} from {{countryName}}.
description.document_not_readable: Your document could not be read. Please try again.
description.id_type_not_acceptable: Invalid document type detected. Please upload your {{documentType}} from {{countryName}}.
description.unable_to_align_document: One or more corners of the document is not within the borders of the image. Please center the document in the frame and try again.
description.unknown_country_code: We couldn't detect the issuer country from your document. Please upload your {{documentType}} from {{countryName}}.
description.country_code_mismatch: The {{documentType}} issuer country didn't match. Please upload your {{documentType}} from {{countryName}}.
description.selfie_face_not_found: We could not detect a face in the selfie. Please try again and make sure that your face is in the frame.
description.selfie_low_confidence: We could not verify your selfie. Please try again.
description.selfie_too_dark: Your image was too dark. Please adjust the lighting and try again.
description.selfie_glare: Your selfie had image glare. Please adjust the lighting and try again.
description.selfie_has_lenses: We detected glasses in your selfie. Please remove your glasses and try again.
description.selfie_has_face_mask: We detected a face mask in your selfie. Please remove all face coverings and try again.
description.unknown_error: An error occurred. Please try again.

selfie-consent.title: We need a selfie to verify your identity
selfie-consent.subtitle: By continuing, you're agreeing to Footprint collecting and processing your biometric data from your selfie and identity document.
selfie-consent.third-party-consent: Optional: Allow Footprint's third-party providers to improve their products with this data. Privacy Policy.
selfie-consent.third-party-consent-text: Allow Footprint's third-party providers to improve their products with this data.

next-side.one-side: Now the photo page of your passport

instructions.position: Position your face within the frame
instructions.readiness: Take the photo when you're ready

feedback.face-too-far: Face is too far from the camera
feedback.face-outside-the-frame: Face is outside the frame outline
feedback.head-not-straight: Face is tilted or looking other way

position-document.title: Align your ID with the frame outline

background.title: Find a background with good contrast

whole-face.title: Position your face within the frame

manual-enabled-toast.title: Manual capture enabled
manual-enabled-toast.description: We noticed it's taking you a while to trigger the automatic capture, so you can now take the picture manually.

country-and-type-selection.title: Scan or upload your ID
country-and-type-selection.subtitle: We need some more information about your identity.

form.not-supported: Sorry, we don't support IDs for your country yet.

selfie-photo-prompt.title: Take a selfie
selfie-photo-prompt.subtitle: This will allow us to validate the ID document you uploaded in the previous step.

whole-face.title: Position your face within the frame
whole-face.description: Keep your head straight pointing at the camera

check-lighting.title: Check your lighting
check-lighting.description: It can't be too bright or too dark.

processing.missing-requirement-error: Sorry, something went wrong! Please restart the onboarding.

retry-limit-exceeded.title: Too many attempts
retry-limit-exceeded.description: Sorry, we can't continue onboarding as you've tried to submit your document images too many times. We'll reach out if we need more info.

device-warning.warning: This action can only be performed on a mobile phone. Please go back to the previous screen/tab and click the "Cancel" button to generate a new QR code with a new URL link. Open the new link on your phone.
